name: Genoise Mousseline
recipeInstructions:
1. PREHEAT OVEN TO 350°F.
2. Place eggs and yolks in the bowl of an electric mixer and beat to break up.
3. Beat in sugar slowly, using a hand mixer to warm the mixture.
4. Beat on high speed until thickened.
5. Sift flour and cornstarch together several times and fold into the egg mixture by hand.
6. Pour batter into a buttered 9-inch springform pan lined with paper.
7. Bake for about 30 minutes, then remove from the pan and cool on a rack.
